Testimonials

5-Star Rated In St. Louis
Trusted By 100+ Happy Clients

Angela R.

22 April 2026

OMG locked my keys IN the car at Schnucks on Manchester with my dog inside, was completely freaking out. Called Nonstop, they got there in under 25 min and had the door open in maybe 90 seconds!! Zero damage. Absolute lifesavers 🙏

Michael T.

12 April 2026

Locked out of my condo on Forsyth around 2am. Called Nonstop Lock & Key and Alex showed up in 18 minutes, popped the door without a single mark. Way faster than I expected for the middle of the night. Very professional guy.

R

Ryan G.

5 April 2026

Couldn't get into my office Saturday morning for an inventory check. Nonstop came out within the hour, got me in without damaging the deadbolt. Same tech recommended a stronger lock for the back door and installed it later that week.

Vanessa K.

30 March 2026

3am emergency, lost my keys at a wedding downtown 🤦‍♀️ Called like 5 places and only Nonstop actually answered. Tech was at my Airbnb in 22 minutes!! Did NOT expect that level of service that late at night, seriously thank you!!!

Jason P.

21 March 2026

Snapped my house key off in the lock at 11pm with my kids waiting in the car 😬 stressed!! Called Nonstop, tech came in 25 minutes, extracted the broken piece, tested the cylinder and said the lock was still good. Charged exactly what he quoted on the phone. Solid guys, would def call them again

Sarah M.

15 March 2026

Just closed on our house in U City and wanted everything rekeyed for peace of mind. Nonstop Lock & Key sent Alex out same day. Did 5 exterior doors in about 90 minutes and even fixed a sticky strike plate on the back door. No surprise fees, paid exactly what was quoted.

David C.

28 February 2026

Lost my only Honda key at the mall on a Sunday. Dealership wanted $500+ PLUS a tow. Nonstop came to the parking lot, Alex cut a new transponder, programmed it, and I was driving home in under an hour!!! Saved me SO much money, can't recommend enough 🔑

Marcus T.

19 February 2026

Needed a spare fob for my Toyota Camry. Took it to the dealer first and they wanted wayyy too much. Nonstop did the same thing for HALF the price at my apartment complex. Tech was super friendly and walked me through the whole programming process 👌

Linda H.

8 February 2026

My ignition started sticking and eventually wouldn't turn at all. A mechanic told me it was an electrical issue and quoted me a fortune. Alex from Nonstop diagnosed it as a worn ignition cylinder in 10 minutes and replaced it the same day for way less.

Brian W.

25 January 2026

Wanted to upgrade all the locks at our new house to a higher security grade. Nonstop walked me through the options (didn't push the most expensive), installed everything in one afternoon. Doors look better than they did before.

Jennifer W.

12 January 2026

Had Nonstop Lock & Key install a Schlage Encode smart lock on our front door. Alex walked us through the app, set up codes for the dog walker, and even paired it with our Ring system. Patient and knew the differences between like 4 brands of smart locks.

Eric N.

30 December 2025

Inherited an old fire safe from my dad without the combo 🤷 Called around and most places quoted insane prices or said they don't even DO safes. Nonstop came out, got it open without damage in like 20 min, then rekeyed it for me. Saved my whole afternoon, great service

Join The Happy Clients List.

How We Are Different

5.0 Star Rating

Trusted By 100+ Local Customers

Family-Owned

Serving St. Louis County Since 2010

We Provide

24/7 Emergency Service

Lockouts, Rekeys, Key Fobs & More

Our Services

Locksmith Services Across St. Louis County

24/7 emergency response for lockouts, lock rekeys, key fob programming, and more, serving homes, cars, and businesses.

Automotive

Car Lockout Service

Locked out of your car? Our mobile locksmiths arrive fast to safely unlock your vehicle without damage.

View Service

Residential

House Lockout Service

Locked out of your home? We use non-destructive methods to get you back inside fast, day or night.

View Service

Residential

Lock Rekey Service

Change who has access to your home without replacing your locks. Rekeying is fast, affordable, and effective.

View Service

Automotive

Car Key Replacement

Lost or broken car keys? We cut and program replacement keys on-site for all makes and models.

View Service

Automotive

Key Fob Programming

Need a new key fob or remote programmed? We program and replace key fobs on-site for most vehicles.

View Service

Residential

Lock Installation & Replacement

New lock installation and old lock replacement for homes and businesses. Deadbolts, knobs, levers, and more.

View Service

We also handle front door lock installation, smart lock setup, lock changes, keyless entry systems, key duplication, transponder key programming, car key cutting, and more. Whatever lock or key issue you're facing in St. Louis County, our mobile team can handle it 24/7.

View All ServicesGet a Free Quote

About Us

Trusted Family-Owned Locksmith In St. Louis County

Since 2010, Nonstop Lock & Key has served homeowners, drivers, and businesses across the St. Louis area. Our family-owned mobile locksmith team covers 20 cities throughout St. Louis County with a 15 to 30 minute response time, 24/7, weekends and holidays included.

From car lockouts and key replacement to lock rekeying and smart lock installation, our licensed technicians handle every locksmith need with upfront pricing and no hidden fees.

Learn More About UsGet a Free Quote

Family-Owned Since 2010

Licensed, insured, and trusted by St. Louis County for over 16 years.

100%GUARANTEE

Our Promise

Honest Service Every Time. Transparent Pricing, No Hidden Fees.

Call Now: (314) 532-1112

Locksmith Service Across St. Louis County
